title: Stories Worth Telling by Community Members
excerpt:

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Check out this video from @Patrick, who many of you will have interacted with here in the community forum.

Patrick recently attended Stories Worth Telling at our HQ in Tel Aviv. We had the chance to meet Patrick personally, show him our culture and how we work, show him around our city and also hear about his amazing and successful use cases fo monday.com!

Get inspired!
